title: Your Agent Failed in Prod. Good Luck Reproducing It. - Tisha Chawla & Susheem Koul, Microsoft
summary: The session introduces a record and replay pattern for autonomous agent workflows that captures all model invocations, tool executions, and state transitions into append-only event logs to enable deterministic replay of failed production runs. This approach moves beyond basic durable execution engines to support true postmortem debugging and root cause analysis of non-deterministic agent failures.
writeup: This talk from Microsoft's Tisha Chawla and Susheem Koul presents a record and replay pattern for debugging autonomous agents that fail in production and cannot be reproduced through standard logging or state recovery. The approach captures model invocations, tool executions, memory reads, and state transitions into an append-only event log, enabling deterministic replay of a failed execution. The concrete takeaway: capturing these events as an immutable log lets engineers perform postmortem root cause analysis on non-deterministic agent failures.
